/usr/bin/gcc-7 -fPIC -g -Xlinker -rpath=/usr/local/lib64 -shared  -o afb-spawn.so CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-binding.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-defaults.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-encoders.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-enums.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-sandbox.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-subtask.c.o CMakeFiles/spawn.dir/spawn-utils.c.o  -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--gc-sections -luuid -ljson-c -lcap -lcap-ng -lseccomp -L/usr//usr/lib64 -lafb-libhelpers -L/usr//usr/lib64 -lafb-libcontroller -lafb-libhelpers -llua5.3 -lm -llua5.3 -lm -lut -lafb-libcontroller -llua5.3 -lm -llua5.3 -lm -lut
